name: Observe
short_description: Program AI countries, climb global leaderboards, and watch your strategies battle for world domination! Create infinite alternate histories or intervene with god-like powers in this ultimate strategy sandbox.
detailed_description:
OBSERVE - Program AI Nations, Dominate the Leaderboards

Program your own AI countries and watch them battle for world supremacy! Observe is the ultimate sandbox where YOU create the intelligence behind entire civilizations, then compete against other players' creations on global leaderboards.

Climb the Competitive Leaderboards

Your AI strategies are automatically tested against challenging scenarios and ranked against players worldwide. Can you program the perfect balance of aggression and diplomacy? Prove it.

  • Seasonal competitions with Hall of Fame recognition

  • Live rankings updated as you improve your scripts

  • Join the growing community of strategy programmers competing for supremacy

AI Studio - Code Your Way to Victory

The heart of Observe is MiniScript - an intuitive programming language that lets anyone create sophisticated AI behaviors:

  • Never coded before? Built-in tutorials get you started in minutes

  • Experienced programmer? The strategic depth is limitless

  • Full documentation and examples included right in the editor

  • Watch your code come alive as nations execute your master plan

  • Test different strategies and refine your approach through iteration

God Controls - Direct the Action

Want to jump in and influence the simulation directly? God Controls let you:

  • Intervene in ongoing conflicts with divine powers

  • Perfect for casual players who want immediate action without programming

  • Spectacular visual effects bring your interventions to life

  • Balance observation with hands-on control whenever you want

Scenario Editor - Craft Infinite Worlds

Design the ultimate testing ground for your AI strategies:

  • 3400+ customizable regions across a detailed world map

  • Create alternate histories - What if Rome never fell? What if Mongol Empire came back?

  • Full control over countries, populations, technology levels, and starting conditions

  • Share scenarios with the community or keep your secret strategies private

  • Save your favorite civilizations to use in any scenario

History Shuffle - Never-Ending Entertainment

Generate infinite procedural scenarios automatically:

  • Mix and match your favorite civilizations in unexpected combinations

  • Endless mode creates new worlds while you work or relax

  • Perfect background entertainment. Set it and forget it

Built for Performance and Scale

  • 60+ FPS performance even with thousands of regions in late-game scenarios

  • Complete campaigns in 10-15 minutes for quick strategic satisfaction

  • Seamless world map with realistic supply lines and geography

  • Real-world population data creates authentic strategic challenges

  • Advanced map modes help you understand complex global situations

Join the competitive community of strategy programmers. Master the art of AI warfare and climb your way to the top of the leaderboards!
